items.title: Exploratory visualization of high-D data
items.description: Map images, gene expression, or embedding vectors to 2D scatter plots for human inspection of groupings, outliers, and batch effects before modeling.

items.title: Qualitative validation of learned embeddings
items.description: Visualize NLP or vision embedding spaces to check whether semantically similar items form local neighborhoods—common in model debugging and demos.

items.title: Hypothesis generation for clustering
items.description: Spot candidate clusters or substructures that motivate formal clustering on original features or PCA scores—not on t-SNE coordinates alone.

items.title: Single-cell and omics dashboards
items.description: Render thousands of cells in 2D for publications and lab meetings; color by cell type or batch to assess separation of known labels.

items.title: Teaching manifold learning concepts
items.description: Demonstrate how non-linear methods preserve local neighborhoods differently from linear PCA scatters on curved synthetic datasets.
